users_table: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY)
users_table_with_auto_increment: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT)
users_table_with_columns: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), password_digest VARCHAR(255))
orders_table: CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT NOT NULL, total_count INT, foo INT)
tab_table: CREATE TABLE tab (id INT PRIMARY KEY)
tab_table_with_foo_column: CREATE TABLE tab (id INT PRIMARY KEY, foo INT)
tab_table_with_textcol: CREATE TABLE tab (id INT PRIMARY KEY, textcol TEXT)
tab_table_with_textcol_no_pk: CREATE TABLE tab (id INT, textcol TEXT)
tab_table_with_foreign_key: CREATE TABLE parent (id INT PRIMARY KEY)
CREATE TABLE tab (id INT PRIMARY KEY, parent_id INT, CONSTRAINT foo_ibfk_1 FOREIGN KEY (parent_id) REFERENCES parent(id))
tab_table_with_index: CREATE TABLE tab (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), INDEX idx_index (name))
foo_table: CREATE TABLE foo (id INT PRIMARY KEY)
foo_temporary_table: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE foo (id INT PRIMARY KEY)
orders_and_customers_table: CREATE TABLE customers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, firstname VARCHAR(100), lastname VARCHAR(100))
CREATE TABLE orders (id INT PRIMARY KEY, customer_id INT, completed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false)
tasks_table: CREATE TABLE tasks (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, title VARCHAR(200), priority INT)
generic_table: CREATE TABLE `table` (id INT PRIMARY KEY, `date` DATE)
permission_groups_table: CREATE TABLE permission_groups (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(100), description TEXT, perm_create BOOLEAN, perm_read BOOLEAN, perm_update BOOLEAN, perm_delete BOOLEAN)
s1_t1_table: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS s1
tb_table: CREATE TABLE tb (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT)
account_table: CREATE TABLE account (account_id INT PRIMARY KEY, balance DECIMAL(10,2))
products_table: CREATE TABLE products (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), price DECIMAL(10,2), category VARCHAR(50))
customers_table: CREATE TABLE customers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, firstname VARCHAR(100), lastname VARCHAR(100))
trans_and_customer_tables: CREATE TABLE trans (id INT PRIMARY KEY)
CREATE TABLE customer (id INT PRIMARY KEY)
table_name_with_index: CREATE TABLE table_name (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), INDEX idx_name (name))
emp_table_with_trigger: CREATE TABLE emp (id INT PRIMARY KEY, salary DECIMAL(10,2), last_modified TIMESTAMP)
CREATE TRIGGER emp_stamp BEFORE UPDATE ON emp FOR EACH ROW SET NEW.last_modified = NOW()
tb_table_with_fulltext: CREATE TABLE tb (id INT, c1 TEXT, c2 TEXT, c3 TEXT, FULLTEXT INDEX ft_c1 (c1), FULLTEXT INDEX ft_c1_c2_c3 (c1, c2, c3))
t_table_for_indexes: CREATE TABLE t (id INT PRIMARY KEY, col VARCHAR(100), textcol TEXT, c1 INT, c2 INT)
